text.title: Take-Home Rubric Template Output Contract
text.summary: JSON-schema output contract the subagent applying take-home-rubric-template must produce. Required fields, forbidden patterns, allowed transformations, plus valid + invalid worked examples.

section.title: Output schema (JSON Schema draft-07)

forbidden.pattern: Any criterion lacks band anchors for at least 3 bands.
Threshold not stated as numeric cutoff.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Order arrays deterministically by their natural key before serialising.

example.note: All required fields populated; forbidden patterns absent.
Missing the first required field — schema rejects.

list.item: All required fields present and non-null.
